ground_truth: Contoso offers a 30-day full refund on all products. Items must be unused and in original packaging. Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days. Digital products are non-refundable once downloaded.

query: How much does express shipping cost?
ground_truth: Express shipping costs $12.99 and takes 2-3 business days.

query: How long is the warranty on electronics?
ground_truth: All Contoso electronics come with a 2-year manufacturer warranty covering defects in materials and workmanship.

query: Does Contoso sell my personal data?
ground_truth: No, Contoso never sells customer data to third parties.

query: How do I redeem loyalty points?
ground_truth: Points can be redeemed at a rate of 100 points = $5 discount.

query: Can I return a digital product?
ground_truth: Digital products are non-refundable once the download link has been accessed.

query: How do I file a warranty claim?
ground_truth: Contact support@contoso.com with your order number and a description of the issue.
International shipping is available to 40 countries with delivery in 10-15 business days.
